data.name: Sex Goddess Chronicles: Lilith's Seduction, An NSFW Porn VN
data.detailed_description:
Congratulations! You've just been promoted… To the position of… GOD!!

An Epic tale of Goddesses, Sex and Magic

If you love RPGs with deep lore, emotional arcs, and profoundly serious world-building…

You’ve come to the wrong place.

Instead, enter a magical fantasy world with comedic writing that knows exactly what kind of game this is.
Embark on an absurdly epic journey, where well-thought-out plans are optional, and every woman is insatiable and can never get enough of your dick. Which is great, because the story mostly progresses through sex scenes.

A lot of them.

Like, a lot a lot. You’ll be amazed how much plot can be advanced by strategic thrusting.

Seriously, every woman in this story is a total sex addict with zero shame and unlimited stamina. You've been warned.

The Story

Play as (name customizable), a man with a tragic backstory: he woke up dangerously horny one morning.
Dive dick-first into the world of Sex Goddess Chronicles, and fulfill your destiny in the primordial battle between the Goddess of Light and Lilith, Goddess of Darkness.

Uncover an ancient mystical cult dedicated to worshiping their God's cock (that's you... The God, that is, not the cock... Even though you do have a very big one.)

And if you get tired of saving the world, you can always let your harem handle everything while you focus on something more important: satisfying Goddesses in other dimensions.

As you've probably figured out by now, this Visual Novel is:

  • Designed to be epic, fun, and extremely playable with one hand

  • NOT about grinding, stat-building, or sandbox chores

  • NOT hiding scenes behind obscure choices. You'll get everything in a single playthrough.

Features:

Over-the-top adult content with supernatural flair

Plot twists with the emotional depth of a telenovela written by a dungeon master

Magical girls, demon queens, jealous Goddesses, and one surprisingly chill girlfriend

Linear story, so you don't miss out on anything

If you want a game you can play with one hand...

If you want epic storytelling that makes fun of epic storytelling...

If you want unapologetically horny magic with a wink to the audience...

Then congratulations on your divine promotion again, O Holy One. THIS IS YOUR DESTINY!!

data.short_description: You've just been promoted… to GOD! Dive dick-first into a hilarious fantasy VN where every woman’s a nympho, the story moves via sex scenes, and your biggest challenge is keeping up. No grinding, no stat-building—just unapologetically horny fun.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Game is non-notarized. May not work with 10.15 Catalina

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
